use_codes.desc: DESONATE GEL IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF MILD TO MODERATE ATOPIC DERMATITIS IN PATIENTS 3 MONTHS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
Desonate is indicated for the treatment of mild to moderate atopic dermatitis in patients 3 months of age and older.
Patients should be instructed to use Desonate for the minimum amount of time as necessary to achieve the desired results
because of the potential for Desonate to suppress the hypothal...
